---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for devtronic
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem description

A clear and concise description of the problem or gap this feature addresses.
Example: "I always have to manually ... when ..."

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you would like. Include any relevant API design, command syntax, or UX details.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or references that support this request.
